title: Inverse?
text: Inverse? Display Unifields in inverse highlighting. Use only in a character mode environment. Description In graphical environments such as Windows, Unifield video definitions can produce unpredictable results. Deprecated for Area and Entity Frames, Labels, Fields. This property could not be set in Uniface 9 GFP and cannot be set in IDE. For backward compatibility (Chui/Unifield) of these objects, it is only migrated when False/True so that value is preserved. Applies To Unifields Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
